modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error when trying to log into LinkedIn account

full_description_text:
- I was trying to log into my LinkedIn but it didn't work.  
- I got an error message that said something about contacting the admin.  
- It was really confusing and I don't know what to do next.
short_description: Error when trying to log into LinkedIn account
description:

- I got an error message that said something about contacting the admin.  
- It was really confusing and I don't know what to do next.
